entry.title: 22 Piece Automotive Wall Setup Combo (1 Split Set + 21 A5 Print)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00

Turn your wall into the ultimate automotive showcase.

The Automotive Wall Setup Combo is designed for true car enthusiasts who want more than just a single poster. Featuring one bold 13×19 Split Poster as the centerpiece and 21 premium A5 automotive posters, this collection transforms any room into a modern garage-inspired display.

From legendary supercars and JDM icons to luxury performance machines and timeless classics, every design has been carefully selected to create a premium, balanced wall arrangement. Whether it's your bedroom, gaming setup, workstation, studio, or garage, this combo delivers an eye-catching automotive aesthetic instantly.

Each poster is printed in high resolution on premium matte paper with vibrant colors, deep blacks, and crisp details to ensure every design stands out beautifully. The centerpiece split poster creates a bold focal point, while the surrounding A5 posters complete the gallery wall with a clean, professional finish.


📦 What's Included

  • 1 × 13×19 Split Poster (3-Piece Set)
  • 21 × A5 Premium Posters
  • Total: 22 Posters
  • Premium Matte Finish
  • High-Resolution Print Quality
  • Frame Not Included

✨ Why You'll Love It

  • Complete ready-to-install automotive gallery wall.
  • Features iconic performance, JDM, luxury, and supercar designs.
  • Creates a premium showroom-inspired room aesthetic.
  • Sharp colors with rich contrast and premium matte finish.
  • Perfect centerpiece for gaming setups, workstations, garages, bedrooms, and studios.
  • Excellent gift for every car enthusiast.

📐 Product Specifications

  • Centerpiece: 13×19 Split Poster (3 Pieces)
  • Surrounding Posters: 21 × A5 Posters
  • Total Pieces: 22
  • Material: Premium Matte Paper
  • Print: High-Definition Digital Printing
  • Frame: Not Included

🏠 Ideal For

  • Gaming Rooms
  • Bedroom Wall Decor
  • Car Enthusiast Setups
  • Garage & Workshop Decoration
  • Office & Workspace Decoration
  • Content Creator Backgrounds

Price: ₹499

*Colors may vary slightly due to monitor settings and photography lighting. Posters are supplied unframed and are intended to be mounted using poster tape, glue dots, or frames.

entry.title: M416 Legendary 3 Weapon Skin | Split Panel Set | Gaming Wall Combo
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 599.00

M416 Legendary Split Wall Combo

Bring a bold gaming-room look to your wall with this 11-piece M416-inspired split poster combo. The set includes one large Glacier design in 13×19" and two A3 split designs featuring Fool and Crimson Skyblade themes.

Design Highlights

The Glacier design creates a frozen blue centerpiece with icy textures, crystal effects, and bold “DOMINANCE” typography. The Fool design adds a dark purple chaos theme with neon accents, while the Crimson Skyblade design brings fiery orange energy with flames, embers, and dramatic weapon detailing.

What's Included

  • 1 × M416 Glacier 5-Piece Split Set – 13×19"
  • 1 × M416 Fool 3-Piece Split Set – A3
  • 1 × M416 Crimson Skyblade 3-Piece Split Set – A3
  • Total: 11 Poster Panels

A complete wall combo made to give your bedroom, gaming setup, or PC corner a premium weapon-skin inspired look.

entry.title: Ultimate Fan Wall Setup - 24 A4 Pack
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 549.00

Ultimate Fan Wall Setup - A4 Pack

Turn your plain wall into a bold, stylish fan-inspired setup with this ready-made A4 wall decor pack. Designed for bedrooms, gaming corners, study rooms, work desks, and personal spaces, this pack gives your wall an instant aesthetic upgrade without the confusion of choosing designs one by one.

This collection brings together a strong mix of action, music, racing, cinematic, and pop-culture-inspired visuals to create a powerful collage-style wall setup. Just arrange them like the reference image, stick them neatly, and your room gets a complete makeover.

Why You’ll Love It

  • Complete ready-to-decorate wall setup
  • Perfect for fan rooms, gaming setups, study spaces, and bedroom walls
  • Curated mix of bold, stylish, and high-impact visuals
  • Easy to arrange as a collage wall
  • Clean matte finish for a premium look
  • Great option for anyone who wants an instant room upgrade

Product Details

  • Pack Type: Curated wall setup pack
  • Size: A4 only
  • Price: ₹549
  • Finish: Matte finish
  • Usage: Bedroom wall, gaming setup, study room, workspace, dorm room, or creative corner

What’s Included?

You will receive the complete A4 wall setup pack as shown in the product images. The designs are selected to match the overall collage look, so you can recreate a similar wall setup easily.

How to Use

  1. Choose the wall or corner you want to decorate.
  2. Plan the layout before sticking.
  3. Use glue dots, double-sided tape, or any wall-safe adhesive.
  4. Stick the prints neatly with equal spacing for the best look.
  5. Enjoy your upgraded wall setup.

Important Note

These are printed sheets and are not self-adhesive. Adhesive, tape, glue dots, frames, and other accessories are not included unless mentioned separately. The final look may slightly vary depending on wall color, lighting, spacing, and arrangement.

Best For

  • Fans who want a bold room setup
  • Gaming and desk setup decoration
  • Bedroom wall makeover
  • Students and hostel rooms
  • Gift for friends who love stylish wall decor
